name: Tuna Slaw
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Red cabbage, cored and shredded
6 1/2 oz can Tuna, packed in olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cabbage with the chopped onion in a bowl.
2. Drain the tuna and discard the packing liquid. Flake the tuna and add to the cabbage mixture.
3. Mash the anchovy fillets with reserved olive oil until smooth. Whisk together the remaining olive oil, red wine vinegar, heavy cream, and black pepper.
4. Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss well.
5. Sprinkle with parsley and serve at room temperature. SERVES: 4-6
